atmosphere: Textured waste-terminal material with clear instrument signals.

oldWarningYellow.description: Control and tag pressure should read as old-warning yellow, not mud gold or Ember orange.

terminalLichenGreen.description: Callable structure should read as terminal lichen green without becoming generic neon.

oliveMethodBridge.description: Methods should bridge callable green and material olive without collapsing into strings.

oxidizedCrtBlue.description: Types and numbers should hold the cool structural lane.

lacqueredPaperString.description: Strings should feel like faded lacquered paper, separate from keyword yellow and method green.

antiGoals: blue becoming a second full foreground
materialRules: Keep charcoal, parchment, and oxidized metal stable while adjusting syntax clarity.
Age belongs mainly to surface and material; syntax lanes must stay crisp.
